rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban in any curriculum or training surface.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Line 5 'how your practice changed' allowed: M6 placement (post-earning at M4); fluent through M5–M6 per AE101 carve-out.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique.
Always "you", never "the student"; teacher framing stays out of body.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 5:'Not a self-congratulation round, not a trainer monologue.'
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: 'trainer monologue' as negation in body prose imports trainer-as-subject framing (rule 7 — teacher framing stays out of body). Recast as the artefact's positive shape ('a reading of your own artefacts...') without the trainer reference.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Rule 2(b) re-amended 2026-05-09 (second pass): bare MN allowed at M2 or later in the training's arc. This is the M6 exercise file — bare M1/M5/M6 in body PASS as curriculum-wide convention.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No time-of-day anchors in body prose.
